22: This code implements a simple task management system using Python and

25: The system employs a SuperSimpleTaskManager class to efficiently manage tasks
26: within memory, utilizing a dictionary structure for rapid data retrieval. Each task is
27: represented by a Task Pydantic model, which encompasses attributes such as a
28: unique identifier, a descriptive text, an optional priority level (P0, P1, P2), and an
29: optional assignee designation.Memory usage varies based on task type, the number
